tasks.title: Route detail header WAY TOO BIG — standardize to finite SubpageLayout compact (APPLIED TO BOTH DETAIL VIEWS)
tasks.user_feedback: route detail view header WAY TOO BIG, should be the same standard size as other details views (standardize)... should be finite size on top, create apprpriate layout wrapper
tasks.fix_summary: Added `size: 'compact'` to SubpageLayout (also added `rightActions` array for multiple icons). Migrated BOTH detail views to <SubpageLayout size="compact">: app/(app)/curated-route/[id].tsx (no right actions) and app/(app)/saved-route/[id].tsx (rename + delete via rightActions array). Replaced floating MapHeaderOverlay (~200pt+ extending into status bar) with a finite 44pt solid bar + titleLarge. Map + body now live below the header instead of under it.
tasks.after: captures/light/after/polyline-01-top.png · captures/dark/after/polyline-01-top.png · captures/light/after/save-01-idle.png · captures/light/after/saved-list.png (standard mode backward compat)
files_changed: components/layouts/subpage-layout.tsx (added size prop + rightActions array; extracted renderHeader/renderNavRow/renderRightActions/renderTitleRow helpers; compact branch uses solid View + titleLarge inline)
app/(app)/curated-route/[id].tsx (replaced MapHeaderOverlay + SafeAreaView with SubpageLayout size="compact"; removed unused useRouter/SafeAreaView/MapHeaderOverlay imports)

app/(app)/saved-route/[id].tsx (replaced all 4 MapHeaderOverlay + SafeAreaView branches with SubpageLayout size="compact"; main view title={data.name} + rightActions=[rename,delete]; removed unused useSafeAreaInsets/SafeAreaView/MapHeaderOverlay/Button/headerActions style/Z_INDEX_HEADER_ACTIONS)

app/(app)/saved-route/__tests__/[id].test.ts (added Pressable to react-native mock; updated back-button testID assertions from route-detail-header to route-detail-{not-found,screen}-back; updated mockBack to mockPush)
app/(app)/saved-route/[id].test.tsx (replaced MapHeaderOverlay mock with SubpageLayout stub; removed SafeAreaView from safe-area mock)
tasks.out_of_scope: app/(app)/(tabs)/index.tsx — the home/plan map screen is full-bleed and intentionally uses the floating glass-morphic MapHeaderOverlay per components/CLAUDE.md convention. Not changed.

verification.tests: pnpm test app/(app)/curated-route → 12/12 pass · pnpm test app/(app)/saved-route/__tests__/[id].test.ts → 34/34 pass · 3 pre-existing failures in [id].test.tsx (FU-2 stale tests) exist on main before this change, not caused by it
verification.captures: 9 fresh screenshots: 3 light polyline + 2 light no-polyline + 1 light save + 3 dark polyline + 1 light saved-list (backward-compat). Header height reduced from ~200pt to ~100pt on all detail views.
